mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CHAT_USER.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_CHAT_USER (ID, USER_ID, CHAT_ROOM_ID) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{chatRoomId})
mapper.select: SELECT TCU.ID, TCU.USER_ID, TCU.CHAT_ROOM_ID, TBU.USER_NICKNAME, TBU.USER_PROFILE, TBU.USER_EMAIL, TBU.USER_EXP FROM TBL_CHAT_USER TCU JOIN TBL_USER TBU ON TCU.USER_ID = TBU.ID WHERE TCU.CHAT_ROOM_ID = #{chatRoomId}
